narrative:
Diogo Costa is a goalkeeper for Portugal, currently holding an overall rating of 7.59/10. This places him in the top 3% of goalkeepers at this tournament. His rating range of 7.17–8.0 reflects his match sample size.

At this World Cup, Costa averages 3.5 saves per 90 minutes. He also records 1.25 clearances per 90 minutes. His expected assists (xA) per 90 minutes at this World Cup is 0.001, lower than his club level xA of 0.003 per 90 minutes over the last two seasons.

He is a vital part of Portugal's defense, with a significant 85% of his rating coming from strong club form. Scouts and fans should watch for his commanding presence and continued high save rate in upcoming matches. His performance will be key for Portugal's progression.
